title: Herbal Stir Fry
description: A simple and flavorful stir fry made with a blend of herbs and a crispy twist.

ingredients.name: Mixed herbs (such as basil, mint, cilantro)
Stir-fry vegetables (such as bell peppers, carrots, broccoli)

instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the crispy fried shallots and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the mixed herbs and stir-fry for another minute until wilted.
Add the stir-fry vegetables and cook until tender-crisp, about 3-4 minutes.
Season with soy sauce and salt to taste.
Serve hot and garnish with additional herbs if desired.
